summary: Hydrated preflight shows no security-sensitive refs. #67137 remains the best live canonical PR for the setup wizard undefined text-prompt trim family, but no merge, fix, or replacement PR action is allowed in this job and the PR still has failing checks plus maintainer-review notes. No close actions are planned: #66653 and the other cluster PRs are already closed, while linked open issues #66657 and #67366 have distinct or still-unlanded follow-up scope and should stay open.
